findings.area: RP00 validator consistency / closeout evidence completeness
findings.finding: The contract is advanced to mark RP00.P02.M07.S06 production_ready (current_subphase, a new subphase_closeouts entry, and closeout_requirements.production_ready_requires) with evidence_root docs/closeout-packs/cp00-034 and closeout_pack_ref CP00-034, but that evidence pack does not exist. The declared target test scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs therefore fails closed, so the subphase cannot be closed out as presented.
findings.evidence: `node scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs` -> REAL_EXIT=1 with 5 errors: 'RP00.P02.M07.S06 production_ready evidence missing docs/closeout-packs/cp00-034/{manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json}'. `ls docs/closeout-packs/cp00-034` -> No such file or directory (git status shows no such untracked dir); cp00-033 contains all 5 files. Contract diff sets current_subphase.status='production_ready'; target_tests includes scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs; validator additionally requires construction-inspection.json to set control_plane_test_and_golden_case_set_audit_hint_precheck_verified===true.
findings.recommendation: Produce and commit the docs/closeout-packs/cp00-034 evidence pack (manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) with construction-inspection.json asserting control_plane_test_and_golden_case_set_audit_hint_precheck_verified=true, command-evidence.json no_real_data=true / writes_product_state=false, then re-run the validator to a clean exit 0 before closeout. Do not declare S06 production_ready until the validator passes.
findings.title: CP00-034-F1

findings.finding: requiredClosedSubphases now ends with both '...RP00.P02.M07.S05', 'RP00.P02.M07.S06', i.e. it includes the CURRENT subphase (S06). Every prior pack excludes the current subphase from this prerequisite list (CP00-033, which closed S05, ended the list at S04). The pack should have appended only S05 (newly closed in CP00-033); appending S06 is an off-by-one over-inclusion that breaks the established invariant. It does not change the validation outcome today because S06's closeout is added in-pack and is production_ready, so the requiredClosedSubphases loop (lines 307-314) still passes — hence non-fatal — but it is an incorrect prerequisite semantic and risks being copy-pasted/compounded into CP00-035+.
findings.evidence: validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs (working tree) requiredClosedSubphases tail: '..."RP00.P02.M07.S04", "RP00.P02.M07.S05", "RP00.P02.M07.S06"]'; currentContractSubphaseId = controlPlaneTestAndGoldenCaseSetAuditHintPrecheckSubphaseId = 'RP00.P02.M07.S06' (line 166). Prior pack commit b224050 (CP00-033) requiredClosedSubphases tail ended at 'RP00.P02.M07.S04' while currentContractSubphaseId was S05 (current excluded). Consumers: lines 307-314 (closeout exists + production_ready) and line 165 p01 filter (RP00.P01 only) — neither fails for S06.
findings.recommendation: Drop 'RP00.P02.M07.S06' from requiredClosedSubphases so the list ends at 'RP00.P02.M07.S05', matching the current-subphase-excluded invariant used by all prior packs. Confirm the validator still passes afterward.
findings.title: CP00-034-F2

findings.finding: required_audit_hint_fields / audit_hint_fields list the logical name 'actor_user_id_or_system_actor', while the concrete audit_hint object carries the actor under the key 'actor_id'. This is a name-list vs concrete-object alias, not a data omission, and matches the convention used by earlier subphases; both are independently asserted by the validators. Noted only for transparency.
findings.evidence: policies/contract requiredAuditHintFields = ['tenant_id','actor_user_id_or_system_actor','action_id','policy_ref','blocked_claim_ref_when_denied_or_missing_context']; service.js audit_hint = { actor_id: permissionResult.actor_id, action_id, ... tenant_id, ... }; assertControlPlaneTestAndGoldenCaseSetAuditHintPrecheckResult checks audit_hint.actor_id and the 5-name audit_hint_fields list separately.
findings.recommendation: No change required; if future consumers parse audit_hint by the listed field names, document that 'actor_user_id_or_system_actor' maps to the concrete 'actor_id' key.
findings.title: CP00-034-F3

parsed_review.summary: CP00-034 implements RP00.P02.M07.S06 (Test And Golden Case Set Audit hint precheck) as a metadata-only, no-write, fail-closed precheck. The implemented surface (policies.js, service.js, validators.js, fixture, README, contract definition) is internally consistent and correct: the precheck consumes the S05 permission result, requires allow_metadata_only + satisfied permission_decision_ref + S05 marker + RP00.P02.M07 source, rejects all 30 forbidden audit claims and any unknown truthy claim, emits a metadata-only audit hint with every *_permitted flag false, matter_id null, no_real_data true, writes_product_state false, completesSourceMicroPhase false, and hands off to S07. All 509 control-plane unit tests pass and the pack does NOT improperly complete RP00.P02.M07, RP00.P02, or RP00 (terminal=false, next_subphase=S07, scope_policy does_not_complete_* all true). However, closeout is BLOCKED: `node scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs` exits 1 with 5 errors because the entire CP00-034 evidence pack is absent, and the validator's requiredClosedSubphases list over-includes the current subphase (off-by-one).
parsed_review.residual_risk: Implementation-level risk is low: the S06 precheck is deterministic, metadata-only, fail-closed on denied/missing permission precheck and on all forbidden/unknown truthy audit claims, performs no audit-ledger/audit-event/test/golden-fixture/database/storage/product-state writes, uses no real client/Matter data (matter_id null), and does not complete the source micro-phase or close RP00.P02/RP00 (next_subphase=S07, terminal=false); 509/509 unit tests pass and all contract/policy/fixture/validator cross-checks pass. The blocking risk is operational/completeness: closeout MUST NOT proceed until the docs/closeout-packs/cp00-034 evidence pack exists and the validator exits 0 (F1). The F2 off-by-one carries forward risk — if uncorrected it will likely be duplicated into subsequent packs' requiredClosedSubphases, eroding the prerequisite invariant — but causes no current validation failure or boundary/real-data exposure. F3 is cosmetic.

adjudication_notes: Claude raw verdict was request_changes because the review ran before CP00-034 evidence files existed and because requiredClosedSubphases incorrectly included the current S06. The evidence files now exist, RP00 validator can inspect construction-inspection control_plane_test_and_golden_case_set_audit_hint_precheck_verified, and requiredClosedSubphases now ends at S05 while currentContractSubphaseId remains S06. F3 is advisory and non-blocking because the logical audit hint field list names actor_user_id_or_system_actor while the concrete frozen receipt carries actor_id consistently across validators and tests.
